hero.title: Cafe Le Den
hero.subtitle: Homemade with love since 1994
hero.description: Fresh bread baked daily, specialty lattes you won't find anywhere else, and homemade meals crafted with care — right in the heart of Valois Village.

about.title: Our Story
about.description: For over 30 years, Cafe Le Den has been the neighborhood's living room in Valois Village. Run by Gina and Josh, we bake our bread fresh every morning, simmer our soups from scratch, and craft specialty drinks with care. From the pistachio latte to our famous hot and sour soup — every item is made with love and the finest ingredients.

featured.title: Customer Favorites
featured.subtitle: The dishes and drinks people keep coming back for
